reviews.review_description: If you hate yourself, this game is perfect for you

I feel as if it was able to play with hand tracking it would be way better but most games probably don't even support it so yea but overall it's a really good game if your on a budget and can't afford climb.

I found this game very enjoyable, particularly as I progressed. Climbing the peaks surprisingly actually works on your muscles since your arm is in raised position for some time and your arm muscles are contracted. I have played it multiple times and would recommend to anyone. Also If you love simple and clean design without much distraction and clutter, the producers have done a great job on that front.
